parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const h = $json.hostname; const s1 = $env.GHOST_SITE1_URL || ''; const s2 = $env.GHOST_SITE2_URL || ''; const parseHostname = (u) => !u ? '' : String(u).replace(/^https?:\/\//, '').replace(/\/.*$/, '').replace(/:\d+$/, ''); const s1h = parseHostname(s1); const s2h = parseHostname(s2); return h.includes(s1h) ? s1 : h.includes(s2h) ? s2 : s1; })() }}/ghost/api/content/posts/slug/{{ $json.postSlug }}/

parameters.name: key
parameters.value: ={{ (() => { const h = $json.hostname; const s1 = $env.GHOST_SITE1_URL || ''; const s2 = $env.GHOST_SITE2_URL || ''; const parseHostname = (u) => !u ? '' : String(u).replace(/^https?:\/\//, '').replace(/\/.*$/, '').replace(/:\d+$/, ''); const s1h = parseHostname(s1); const s2h = parseHostname(s2); return h.includes(s1h) ? ($env.GHOST_KEY_SITE1 || $vars.GHOST_KEY_SITE1) : h.includes(s2h) ? ($env.GHOST_KEY_SITE2 || $vars.GHOST_KEY_SITE2) : ($env.GHOST_KEY_SITE1 || $vars.GHOST_KEY_SITE1); })() }}
